hooks.command: echo 'MANDATORY: Before writing any implementation code, declare every change and its test (see Code Change Rules Step 0 in CLAUDE.md). Tests are required for ALL changes — including bug fixes, timing fixes, and refactors. Zero tests without explicit user approval is a policy violation.'

echo 'Deleting a git-tracked file is reversible (recoverable via git restore), so it is NOT a Tier C irreversible action — do not ask for confirmation on reversibility grounds alone. Still inspect the target first and surface anything that contradicts the task before deleting.'
